Hero.descSuffix: & Custom Lighting. From design, installation, programming, to maintenance — we deliver unforgettable visual experiences.

About.label: About Us
About.p1Suffix: specializes in Addressable LED Strips and Lighting, focused on delivering high-quality products and services that meet the demands of the modern market.
About.p2: We believe lighting is not just about aesthetics — it's about character. How light works technically, interacts with space, supports function, and creates a consistent, controlled visual experience.
About.visionText: To become a leading, innovative, adaptive, and trusted brand in the LED and Lighting industry, both nationally and internationally.
About.missionText: To deliver high-quality products and services with the highest standards and build trust through professional service.
About.commitmentText: To build long-term relationships with our clients through quality, trust, and consistency of service.
About.approachText: Custom solutions for every project — from planning, installation, programming, to maintenance.

Services.label: Our Services
Services.subheading: From planning to maintenance, we handle every aspect of your lighting project.
Services.ledDesc: We design and install addressable LED strip systems tailored to your visual concept, space requirements, and intended use.
Services.videotronDesc: LED display (videotron) installation for stages, buildings, malls, and outdoor — from planning and installation to commissioning.
Services.programmingDesc: We program your lighting system to create visual effects, scene settings, automation, and system synchronization.
Services.fixturesDesc: We develop custom LED fixtures with designs and specs fully tailored to your project requirements.
Services.stageLightingDesc: Complete stage lighting system installation — from planning and design to full system testing.
Services.maintenanceLedDesc: Ongoing maintenance and repair services to keep your LED strip installations performing at their best.
Services.maintenanceStageDesc: Professional maintenance and servicing for stage lighting systems, ensuring they're always performance-ready.

VideoShowcase.subheading: Every installation is a fusion of craftsmanship, art, and the latest lighting technology.

Advatek.descriptionBrand: Official Authorized Dealer of Advatek Lighting
Advatek.descriptionMiddle: in Indonesia. Every LED pixel installation we do uses the
Advatek.descriptionSuffix: controller — the global benchmark for professional lighting installations where reliability is non-negotiable.
Advatek.footer: As an authorized dealer, we guarantee product authenticity, full warranty, and direct technical support.
Advatek.a4sDesc: Up to 24 universes, sleek design, electrical fault protection. Ideal for professional commercial installs.
Advatek.e16sDesc: Most cost-efficient 16-output controller. Drives up to 96 universes — perfect for large-scale projects.
Advatek.t8sDesc: Long-range 300m data transmission. High-impact solution for distributed and outdoor installations.

Portfolio.label: Portfolio
Portfolio.subheading: Every project is a new canvas. We deliver lighting solutions that are not just beautiful — but speak to the character of the space.

WhyUs.transparentDesc: Our transparent, measurable work culture means you always know exactly where your project stands.
